volume_profile.note: Volume profile (70% value area) + top HVN/LVN nodes. Current = up to snapshot time (no lookahead)

tpo_profile.note: Compact TPO facts for ROCKIT – single prints = rejection, fattening = acceptance. Rejection flags + effective poor + naked priors prioritize exhaustion/fade reads.

fvg_detection.note: Unfilled FVGs last 3-5 periods – bullish = discount zone, bearish = premium zone. BPR = opposing engulfing inversion. Engulfed = current FVG fully covers past opposite-type FVG.

twenty_percent_rule.note: 20P: 3x5min consecutive closes beyond IB. Stop=2xATR (NOT IB boundary). 2R target. Long bias on NQ.

va_edge_fade.note: VA Edge Fade: SHORT at VAH poke=70% WR. 2x5min entry+2ATR stop. 0.5ATR trail=dead zone (avoid).
